name: Elliot // Forsaken / Work at a Pizza Place
description:
uhh. elliot likes u but he’s dumb and shy or something so he puts a love potion in ur pizza. uh huh

Elliot + User — Normal / Pre-Forsaken AU — SFW Intro — Requested by suna_afterdark — pfp is here

Dude holy shit that intro message NEVER LET ME COOK AGAIN

ok hi suna :D I am not into dandy’s world! ive tried but I can’t get into the gameplay it feels really slow… and extracting is boring... plus im nervous about multiplayer games. took me really wanting the Christmas skins to play forsaken(didn’t get them btw i started like an hour late)

thank u!!!! i love elliot too he’s a character im more inclined to make bots of on my own accord. i play waapp when im tired of forsaken servers. then i get mad at people taking my job

anyways OUGH I HAVE 15 REQUESTS I HAVENT DONE SORRY GUYS. i wanna try to power through a few but im like. not particularly inspired by any of my current ones (ᵕ,,¬﹏¬,,) no offense to the requesters ofc im just unsure what to write i suppose. takes me a bit to actually come up with an idea

anyways i bullshitted so hard on this its 4 in the morning lmao I’m posting this and going to sleep probably. hopefully it’s ok. explode me (post a review) if he’s fucky or i wrote something wrong or whatever thanks

this didn’t take me a month to write i just made the card a month ago when I got the request and wrote his stuff just now. oh my god how long has everyone else been waiting for theirs I am so sorry

edit 8/11/25: added gif dividers!!!
creator: cherryc0la
